MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN OPPOSITION TO PETITION FOR ALTERNATIVE WRIT OF MANDATE FILED BY RESPONDENT DIRECTOR OF THE DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES

LAW AND MOTION, 301, PETITIONER JULIAN GOARD'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE COMPELLING DMV TO SET ASIDE SUSPENSION - THE COURT TOOK THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. THE COURT ISSUED A TENTATIVE DECISION. PETITIONER JULIAN GOARD'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE IS DENIED. PETITIONER HAS NOT CARRIED HIS BURDEN OF PROVING THAT RESPONDENT'S DECISION IS CONTRARY TO THE WEIGHT OF THE EVIDENCE. MR. HAMILTON TO PREPARE STATEMENT OF DECISION GIVING MR. CONROY AN OPPORTUNITY TO FILE HIS OBJECTIONS. COST TO BE RECOVERED BY THE PREVAILING PARTY PER STATUTE. PER DIEM FEES ASSESSED BY THE COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
